allow: PowerShell($env:PATH -split ';' | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path "$_\\node.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "$_ has node.exe" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Backend not reachable: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Backend UP: $\($r.StatusCode\)`n$\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Backend not up yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Backend UP: $\($r.StatusCode\)`n$\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Still not up: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@test.com","password":"test123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)`n$\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Host $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($body = '{"name":"Test","email":"test@test.com","password":"test123"}'; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $response.Content)

PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("ac-iry9en9-shard-00-00.s82vii3.mongodb.net", 27017\); Write-Host "Port 27017 OPEN" } catch { Write-Host "Port 27017 BLOCKED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) })

PowerShell($body = '{"name":"Test User","email":"testuser99@test.com","password":"test123"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"testuser99@test.com","password":"test123"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json)
PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":5000\\s"\).ToString\(\).Trim\(\).Split\(\)[-1]; Stop-Process -Id $pids -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed PID $pids")
